title: cyperus subtrigonus
intro: Cyperus subtrigonus, also known as the Three-angled Sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus subtrigonus include the relief of pain and swelling, as well as the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Cyperus subtrigonus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
